Reference.Citation: National Institutes of Health; Gala early feasibility study for the treatment of chronic bronchitis in the United States (Gala_EFS). ClinicalTrials.gov website. https://clinicaltrials.gov/ct2/show/NCT03631472 Published August 2018 Accessed January 2019.
